13099 S Warnock Rd, Oregon City, OR 97045, USA

Three old plum trees along the fence line. Small purple fruit probably Italian. Watch the ditch. Best to walk or bike down small country road Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
2051 Kaen Rd, Oregon City, OR 97045, USA

On the street/sidewalking edging near the public services building there is creeping raspberry. Cultivar unknown. Fruit are small but in on the more mature plants there are relatively large quantities of (admittedly small) fruit. Decent flavor. Access: Public.
